name: voxellab
description: VoxelLab: browser-based medical imaging viewer (static site; no app bundler).

scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:py && npm run check:data && npm run check:geometry && npm run test:node && npm run test:browser
scripts.check:js: npm run lint:ci && npm run check:js:syntax && npm run check:styles
scripts.check:js:syntax: node --check viewer.js && node --check middleware.js && for f in js/*.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.check:py: node scripts/run_python.mjs -m py_compile *.py scripts/*.py && npm run check:py:types
scripts.check:data: node scripts/run_python.mjs scripts/check_manifest.py --manifest data/manifest.json --config config.json && node scripts/run_python.mjs scripts/check_assets.py --manifest data/manifest.json --mode local-fast
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:browser
